title: FloristryWarehouse Artificial Autumn Red Orange Rosehip Berry Spray 95cm/37 Inches Tall
features: A beautifully realistic spray of vibrant orange and red rosehips, complete with 33 berries and faux silk green foliage on flexible, wired plastic stems.
Each rosehip measures between 1.5–2.5 cm (0.6–1 inch) in length, adding a natural and lifelike touch.
The spray features 33 rosehips in total, set on a wired stem measuring 95 cm (37 inches) long.
Perfect for bringing height, texture, and rich seasonal colour to autumn and winter arrangements, floral displays, or festive decorations.
description: A beautifully realistic spray of vibrant orange and red rosehips, complete with 33 berries and faux silk green foliage on flexible, wired plastic stems. Each rosehip measures between 1.5–2.5 cm (0.6–1 inch) in length, adding a natural and lifelike touch. The spray features 33 rosehips in total, set on a wired stem measuring 95 cm (37 inches) long. Perfect for bringing height, texture, and rich seasonal colour to autumn and winter arrangements, floral displays, or festive decorations. Can be trimmed for craft projects, or used to embellish handmade wreaths, garlands, and table centrepieces. For indoor use only – prolonged exposure to the elements may cause the berries to split. Packing note - we may bend the stem slightly to minimise the packaging but the stems can be easily straightened when unpacked. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.
